title: Control-vs-Content Separation Plan
goal: Ensure control-layer prompts (dispatch instructions) never render as frontstage content; only LLM-generated content is displayed.

context.current_risk: rendering.py::_dispatch_body() contains multi-phase templates and is called by build_conversation_entries() for cycle.start, enabling template contamination of the public feed.

principles: Control-layer communications and content-layer outputs are different channels and must be consumed separately.
Frontstage rendering may only display content-layer outputs or artifacts produced by LLM execution.
No local template text should appear in frontstage rendering.

changes.description: Remove control-layer dispatch text from frontstage feed.
details: Stop calling _dispatch_body() from build_conversation_entries() for cycle.start.
Replace the cycle.start entry with a neutral system entry that only links to cycle_task_plan artifacts (if present) and contains no templated instruction text.
Mark any future control-layer entries as hidden-by-default; do not render in public feed.

changes.description: Demote _dispatch_body() to internal-only helper or return empty for frontstage usage.
details: Add explicit comment: control-layer prompt text must not be rendered in frontstage.
If _dispatch_body() remains, ensure any caller is non-public or internal logs only.

changes.description: Ensure control-layer payloads remain stored for orchestration but are not rendered.
details: No schema changes required; keep payloads for server decisions.
Do not add new frontstage paths for control-layer payload visibility.

acceptance_criteria: Frontstage conversation feed contains only LLM-generated content or artifact links.
No templated dispatch text appears in any rendered HTML pages (conversation/material/review/proofread/recheck).
Control-layer payloads remain available for orchestration but are not exposed in public views.
validation: Search rendered HTML for known dispatch phrases (e.g., "请审", "请提交", "请以 manager 身份"). Expect zero hits.
Open conversation.html and confirm cycle.start entry is a neutral system note or artifact link.
Run grep for _dispatch_body() usage; ensure no public rendering path uses it.
risk_notes: If cycle.start becomes empty without a replacement, users may lose visibility of run start; use artifact links as a neutral replacement.
Avoid adding new templated content elsewhere to compensate for removed dispatch text.
server_prompt_hint: Implement strict separation: control-layer prompts are for orchestration only, never for frontstage rendering; only content-layer LLM outputs should be visible to users.
